summary: UI State Machine feature testing completed. All critical requirements PASS. Fixed a bug found during testing: `new Image()` constructor was conflicting with lucide-react Image import - changed to `window.Image()`. Backend: 10/10 tests pass. Frontend: State machine working correctly - status badge shows 'Validating Assets' initially, then transitions to appropriate final state. No contradictory states possible.

integration_issues.issue: CORS error for R2 CDN images (pub-c251248e414545848d34b8c1b97ecdb3.r2.dev) - images blocked by CORS policy. SafeImage handles gracefully with gradient fallback.
integration_issues.note: R2 bucket needs CORS configuration to allow requests from narrative-suite.preview.emergentagent.com

action_items: Configure R2 bucket CORS headers to fix image loading issues
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL P0.1 PASS: Admin credits display correctly (999999 not 0) in Photo-to-Comic header
CRITICAL P0.1 PASS: Generate button is NOT disabled for admin (canAfford uses isUnlimited check)
CRITICAL P0.2 PASS: Status badge shows 'Validating Assets' (amber) immediately after generation completes
CRITICAL P0.2 PASS: Status badge only shows 'Comic Ready' AFTER both preview AND download are validated
CRITICAL P0.3 PASS: Download button shows 'Verifying...' during VALIDATING state
CRITICAL P0.3 PASS: Share buttons (Copy Link, Twitter, WhatsApp) are disabled unless uiState === READY
CRITICAL P0.4 PASS: It is IMPOSSIBLE for 'Comic Ready' badge and 'Verifying...' download button to appear simultaneously
CRITICAL P0.5 PASS: SafeImage renders gradient fallback for CORS-blocked/placehold.co/null URLs
BUG FIX: Changed `new Image()` to `new window.Image()` on line 320 to avoid conflict with lucide-react Image import

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all P0 state machine requirements verified working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: UI State Machine feature is working. Key points: (1) uiState is now single source of truth with values IDLE|PROCESSING|VALIDATING|READY|PARTIAL_READY|FAILED, (2) STATUS_CONFIG maps uiState to badge appearance, (3) Share buttons disabled unless uiState===READY, (4) Download button text changes based on uiState. BUG FIXED: Changed `new Image()` to `new window.Image()` to avoid lucide-react import collision. R2 CORS issue remains - images from pub-c251248e414545848d34b8c1b97ecdb3.r2.dev are blocked but SafeImage handles gracefully.

P0.2_Status_Badge_State_Machine.final_state: Comic Saved (PARTIAL_READY - due to CORS preview failure)

bug_fix_applied.reason: Image was conflicting with lucide-react Image icon import
